channel.title: Obesity on 2 More Weeks
channel.description: Recent content in Obesity on 2 More Weeks

item.title: FDA Approves First Daily Obesity Pill; The Revolution Remains, As Ever, Two Weeks From Scale
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration approved Eli Lilly’s orforglipron, marketed as Foundayo, on 1 April 2026, the first daily oral GLP-1 obesity pill that patients can take at any time of day without food or water restrictions, according to the FDA and Lilly. The 2weeker Administration has reviewed the approval and reached a familiar conclusion: the breakthrough has arrived, and the part where it reaches everyone remains approximately two weeks away.
